title: UI-wide search, snapshot media, and README rendering
summary: EVE UI now uses a command-modal search flow instead of a dedicated search page, applies app-wide custom scrollbars and stronger dark-preview styling, shows longer snapshot titles without redundant snap IDs, renders snapshot images with in-app preview modals, displays README Mermaid flowcharts, and uses the provided eve.svg logo in the navigation and repository header.
userVisibleChange: Users can search from the sidebar or Command-K in one modal, inspect snapshot images without leaving the app, read README diagrams as rendered visuals, and see cleaner snapshot timelines with the eve logo and improved dark-mode surfaces.

risks.title: Mermaid support is intentionally lightweight
risks.mitigation: Implemented rendering for the flowchart/graph syntax used by the README and left unsupported Mermaid blocks as copyable code rather than failing.

risks.title: Dark preview still relies on utility-class overrides
risks.mitigation: Expanded the global dark-preview overrides for the hard-coded color utilities currently used by the app and verified the repository page after toggling dark mode.

timeline.title: Replaced search page with modal search
timeline.summary: Removed the /search route and page, wired the sidebar input and Command-K to the shared search modal, and cleaned result rows to emphasize titles.

timeline.title: Improved snapshots and media previews
timeline.summary: Resolved local image artifact URLs through the repository artifacts API, rendered image thumbnails on snapshot pages, and opened images in a dialog modal.

timeline.title: Rendered README diagrams
timeline.summary: Extended the custom markdown viewer to render Mermaid flowchart and graph code blocks as inline SVG diagrams with a safe code fallback.

timeline.title: Polished app chrome
timeline.summary: Added global custom scrollbars, broadened dark-preview color overrides, removed redundant snap IDs from lists, and used ui/public/eve.svg in the sidebar and repository header.

timeline.title: Ran automated and browser checks
timeline.summary: Verified with UI tests, Go tests, production UI build, diff whitespace check, and Playwright checks for search modal, README Mermaid rendering, dark preview toggle, and snapshot image modal.

decisions.title: Use the existing command modal as the only search surface
decisions.rationale: The app already had a Command-K overlay, so routing sidebar search into it removes the duplicate results page while preserving keyboard search.

decisions.title: Use existing artifact-serving API for snapshot images
decisions.rationale: Repository artifact previews already had a safe local artifact URL convention, so snapshot pages now use the same API path instead of raw filesystem-like URLs.

decisions.title: Keep Mermaid rendering local
decisions.rationale: Adding a full Mermaid dependency was unnecessary for the README flowcharts and would increase the bundle; the local renderer covers current diagrams and fails gracefully.

validation.output: Vitest ran src/format.test.ts with 3 passing tests.
tsc --noEmit, vite build, and copy-dist completed successfully; Vite reported the existing chunk-size warning.
Verified sidebar search opens the modal, repository README shows Mermaid diagrams, dark preview toggles without DOM regressions, and snapshot image thumbnails open in an in-app modal.
